_readme: Manually-maintained follower counts for channels without automated API integration.
The fetch script reads this file and applies these values to matching channels.
Keys under each platform are channel handles (exactly as configured in GAMES).
Set 'followers' to the latest number you observed. Set 'asOf' to the check date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Leave 'followers' as null or remove the entry to fall back to 'Awaiting API credentials' state.
To edit without cloning the repo: open this file on GitHub.com and click the pencil icon.
After editing, GitHub Actions will pick up the new values on the next workflow run.
